THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOVEL, CHRISTIAN AKA CHRISTIAN JOVELL SIMMONS, SHERYL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3605 - 20TH ST, #6, STAYED UNTIL DEC-10-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER STAY DATE; DEFTS. WAIVE AND FORFEIT SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1027.00; IF DEFTS. FAIL TO VACATE PLTF. SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFTS. IN FULL AMOUNT OF RENTS AND DAMAGES, PLUS COSTS; MINUS SECURITY DEPOSIT; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
